a.xlink:title: Abstract base class for shader-based buffer processing.
ShaderProcessor that uploads node outputs to descriptor sets.
ShaderProcessor that reads Forma element state and routes it to push constants or descriptor bindings...
Central computational transformation interface for continuous buffer processing.
Preprocessor that evaluates an SDF field into a corner grid on the GPU.

Compute pass that writes UV and optionally samples colour into a vertex SSBO.
